tasks.subject: Task 0: Iteration kernel (scalar)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Header-only `kepler_lcd_iterate<double>` implementing EMTG-style Laguerre-Conway-Der at order N=1..10. Returns KeplerLCDResult with X*, U0..U3, r, sigma, converged flag.

**Files:**
- Create: `include/tycho/detail/astro/kepler_lcd_iterate.h`
- Create: `tests/cpp/astro/test_kepler_lcd.cpp`
- Modify: `tests/cpp/CMakeLists.txt`

**Verify:** `ctest --test-dir tests/cpp/astro -R KeplerLCDKernel --output-on-failure`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["include/tycho/detail/astro/kepler_lcd_iterate.h", "tests/cpp/astro/test_kepler_lcd.cpp", "tests/cpp/CMakeLists.txt"], "verifyCommand": "cd build && ninja -j6 tycho_tests && ctest --test-dir tests/cpp/astro -R KeplerLCDKernel --output-on-failure", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Matches existing propagate_cartesian to 1e-10 rel on LEO/MEO/hyperbolic", "dt=0 fast path returns identity", "Hyperbolic asymptote guard returns converged=false", "Multi-period round-trip within 1e-4 km"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Iteration kernel (per-lane SuperScalar)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Specialize `kepler_lcd_iterate` for `Eigen::Array<double, W, 1>` via per-lane scalar dispatch.

**Files:**
- Modify: `include/tycho/detail/astro/kepler_lcd_iterate.h`
- Modify: `tests/cpp/astro/test_kepler_lcd.cpp`

**Verify:** `ctest --test-dir tests/cpp/astro -R KeplerLCDKernelSS --output-on-failure`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["include/tycho/detail/astro/kepler_lcd_iterate.h", "tests/cpp/astro/test_kepler_lcd.cpp"], "verifyCommand": "cd build && ninja -j6 tycho_tests && ctest --test-dir tests/cpp/astro -R KeplerLCDKernelSS --output-on-failure", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SS dispatch matches scalar per-lane to 1e-12", "Mixed-orbit-type lanes all converge per-lane"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Codegen script + generated header
tasks.description:
**Goal:** SymPy script emits KeplerPrimal_VF (S, 11→6) and KeplerResidual_VF (F, 10→1) into `kepler_propagator_closed_form.h`.

**Files:**
- Create: `utils/codegen_kepler_propagator.py`
- Create (generated): `include/tycho/detail/astro/kepler_propagator_closed_form.h`
- Modify: `tests/cpp/astro/test_kepler_lcd.cpp`

**Verify:** `ctest --test-dir tests/cpp/astro -R KeplerClosedForm --output-on-failure`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["utils/codegen_kepler_propagator.py", "include/tycho/detail/astro/kepler_propagator_closed_form.h", "tests/cpp/astro/test_kepler_lcd.cpp"], "verifyCommand": "cd build && ninja -j6 tycho_tests && ctest --test-dir tests/cpp/astro -R KeplerClosedForm --output-on-failure", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Codegen exits 0", "Generated header compiles", "No pow() calls in compute body", "Primal matches inline f/g to 1e-13", "Residual ~0 at converged X*"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: IFT layer — Jacobian
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `kepler_propagate_jacobian` composes total 6×7 Jacobian via 1st-order IFT and U-recursions.

**Files:**
- Create: `include/tycho/detail/astro/kepler_propagator_ift.h`
- Create: `tests/cpp/astro/test_kepler_ift.cpp`
- Modify: `tests/cpp/CMakeLists.txt`

**Verify:** `ctest --test-dir tests/cpp/astro -R KeplerIFT_Jacobian --output-on-failure`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["include/tycho/detail/astro/kepler_propagator_ift.h", "tests/cpp/astro/test_kepler_ift.cpp", "tests/cpp/CMakeLists.txt"], "verifyCommand": "cd build && ninja -j6 tycho_tests && ctest --test-dir tests/cpp/astro -R KeplerIFT_Jacobian --output-on-failure", "acceptanceCriteria": ["xf bit-equivalent to propagate_cartesian", "Jacobian matches FD 5e-7 rel across orbit fixtures", "Near-parabolic Jacobian matches FD 5e-6 rel"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: IFT layer — adjoint Hessian
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `kepler_propagate_adjoint_hessian` returns total xf, jac, adjgrad, adjhess via 2nd-order IFT.

**Files:**
- Modify: `include/tycho/detail/astro/kepler_propagator_ift.h`
- Modify: `tests/cpp/astro/test_kepler_ift.cpp`

**Verify:** `ctest --test-dir tests/cpp/astro -R KeplerIFT_Hessian --output-on-failure`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["include/tycho/detail/astro/kepler_propagator_ift.h", "tests/cpp/astro/test_kepler_ift.cpp"], "verifyCommand": "cd build && ninja -j6 tycho_tests && ctest --test-dir tests/cpp/astro -R KeplerIFT_Hessian --output-on-failure", "acceptanceCriteria": ["xf and jac match Jacobian-only path", "adjgrad = jacᵀ·λ to 1e-13", "adjhess matches FD 5e-6 (5e-5 near-parabolic)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Rewrite propagate_cartesian
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace body of propagate_cartesian<Scalar> with kernel call + closed-form. Public API unchanged.

**Files:**
- Modify: `include/tycho/detail/astro/kepler_utils.h`

**Verify:** `ctest --test-dir tests/cpp/astro -R KeplerPropagation --output-on-failure`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["include/tycho/detail/astro/kepler_utils.h"], "verifyCommand": "cd build && ninja -j6 tycho_tests && ctest --test-dir tests/cpp/astro -R KeplerPropagation --output-on-failure", "acceptanceCriteria": ["MultiPeriodReturn passes", "HyperbolicTrajectory passes", "BM_PropagateCartesian builds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Rewrite KeplerPropagator VF
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace kepler_propagator.h with hand-written VF delegating to IFT layer. Delete commented-out hand-rolled block.

**Files:**
- Rewrite: `include/tycho/detail/astro/kepler_propagator.h`

**Verify:** `ctest --test-dir tests/cpp/astro -R KeplerPropagation --output-on-failure && conda run -n tycho python -m pytest tychopy/test/test_OptimalControl/test_Integrators.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["include/tycho/detail/astro/kepler_propagator.h"], "verifyCommand": "ctest --test-dir tests/cpp/astro -R KeplerPropagation --output-on-failure && conda run -n tycho python -m pytest tychopy/test/test_OptimalControl/test_Integrators.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["VF<7,6,Analytic,Analytic>", "compute_impls delegate to IFT layer", "AdjointConsistency passes 1e-6", "Python integrator tests pass", "No commented-out code"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Add VF benchmarks
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add 4 new VF-path benchmarks to bench_kepler.cpp.

**Files:**
- Modify: `bench/cpp/kepler/bench_kepler.cpp`

**Verify:** `cd build && ./bench/cpp/bench_all --benchmark_filter='BM_KeplerPropagator'`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bench/cpp/kepler/bench_kepler.cpp"], "verifyCommand": "cd build && ninja -j6 bench_all && ./bench/cpp/bench_all --benchmark_filter='BM_KeplerPropagator'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 new VF benchmarks compile and run"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Pre-merge verification gate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run CLAUDE.md §Pre-Merge Verification Sequence — full ctest, all 38 examples, brachistochrone, bench compare. Document results.

**Files:**
- Create: `docs/dev/plans/2026-05-02-kepler-propagator-lcd-bench.md`

**Verify:** All four steps in CLAUDE.md §Pre-Merge Verification Sequence

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/dev/plans/2026-05-02-kepler-propagator-lcd-bench.md"], "verifyCommand": "cd build && ctest --output-on-failure && cd .. && conda run -n tycho bash -c 'MPLBACKEND=Agg python scripts/run_examples.py' && cd build && ninja -j6 brachistochrone_cpp && ./examples/cpp_examples/static/brachistochrone/brachistochrone_cpp && cd .. && bench/bench_track.sh compare", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All ctest pass", "38 examples pass", "Brachistochrone converges", "Bench compare clean"]}
```
